name: Dolphin Parmesan
recipeIngredient: Flour Seasoned With Salt And Pepper -- for dredging
Egg Beaten With A Little Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse fillets and pat dry.
2. Dredge the fillets in flour seasoned with salt and pepper, dip in beaten egg mixed with a little milk, then coat with Italian bread crumbs.
3. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Pan sear the dredged dolphin filets until lightly browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Transfer the fillets to a casserole dish or baking dish.
6. Top each fillet with tomato sauce and shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Sprinkle grated Parmesan over the top of the cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 10-12 minutes.
